srs.title: SRS Settings
srs.description: Configure spaced repetition parameters for optimal learning.
srs.dailyNewLimitHint: Maximum number of new cards shown per day per deck.

answerMode.title: Answer Mode
answerMode.description: Set how you choose answers during study

tts.title: Auto TTS Reading
tts.description: Auto-read TTS-enabled fields when flipping card
tts.note: TTS language follows field settings in card template. Play button always shows regardless of auto reading.

srsConfig.title: SRS Configuration
srsConfig.description: Default SRS settings for new decks. Each deck can override these.

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure AI providers for card generation. Keys are encrypted locally.
aiProviders.securityNote: API keys are stored locally on your device using encrypted storage and never sent to our servers.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.reminderDesc: You'll be reminded daily at 9:00 AM to review your cards.

account.title: Account
account.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
account.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.

links.userGuideDesc: Feature guide, learning tips, sharing methods
